title: rubus × falsicuneatiformis
intro: Rubus × falsicuneatiformis, a hybrid species of raspberry, is a deciduous shrub that belongs to the Rosaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Rubus × falsicuneatiformis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce oxidative stress and alleviate symptoms of certain diseases. Herbal preparations of Rubus × falsicuneatiformis include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to make medicinal remedies for various health conditions.
